title: Privilege waiver
doc_html:
Art. 926.4. Privilege waiver

            By raising any claim of ineffective assistance of counsel, the defendant waives the attorney-client privilege as to any information necessary to allow the state to rebut the claim.

            Acts 2025, No. 393, §1.
doc_text:
Art. 926.4.  Privilege waiver
By raising any claim of ineffective assistance of counsel, the defendant waives the
attorney-client privilege as to any information necessary to allow the state to rebut the claim.
Acts 2025, No. 393, §1.
